parameters.pythonCode:
import duckdb, time, gc
from contextlib import contextmanager
DB_PATH = '/files/duckdb/siga_v1.duckdb'
@contextmanager
def db_con(path=DB_PATH, retries=5, delay=0.3):
    con = None
    for attempt in range(retries):
        try:
            con = duckdb.connect(path)
            break
        except Exception as e:
            if 'lock' in str(e).lower() and attempt < retries - 1:
                time.sleep(delay * (2 ** attempt))
            else:
                raise
    try:
        yield con
    finally:
        if con is not None:
            try: con.close()
            except Exception: pass
        gc.collect()
items = _items
stmts = [
    "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS equipment (equipment_id VARCHAR PRIMARY KEY, ingestion_id VARCHAR NOT NULL, project VARCHAR, entity_type VARCHAR, source_channel VARCHAR, source_sender_id VARCHAR, source_sender_name VARCHAR, source_message_id VARCHAR, source_message_text VARCHAR, received_at TIMESTAMP, category VARCHAR, subtype VARCHAR, label VARCHAR, brand VARCHAR, model VARCHAR, serial_number VARCHAR, manufacturer_plate_raw_text VARCHAR, technical_specs_json VARCHAR, business_context_json VARCHAR, condition_label VARCHAR, location_hint VARCHAR, ownership_mode VARCHAR, purchase_price DOUBLE, purchase_currency VARCHAR, acquisition_note VARCHAR, notes VARCHAR, confidence DOUBLE, review_required BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE, review_reasons_json VARCHAR, missing_fields_json VARCHAR, processing_status VARCHAR, final_status VARCHAR, final_drive_folder_id VARCHAR, final_drive_folder_path VARCHAR, status VARCHAR DEFAULT 'draft', created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)",
    "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS equipment_media (media_id VARCHAR PRIMARY KEY, equipment_id VARCHAR, ingestion_id VARCHAR NOT NULL, image_index INTEGER, image_role VARCHAR, original_filename VARCHAR, drive_file_name VARCHAR, mime_type VARCHAR, temp_drive_folder_id VARCHAR, temp_drive_file_id VARCHAR, drive_web_view_link VARCHAR, final_drive_file_id VARCHAR, final_drive_web_view_link VARCHAR, final_drive_path VARCHAR, ocr_json VARCHAR, classification_json VARCHAR, ocr_confidence DOUBLE, processing_status VARCHAR, error_json VARCHAR, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)",
    "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS equipment_ingestion_log (ingestion_id VARCHAR PRIMARY KEY, project VARCHAR, entity_type VARCHAR, source_channel VARCHAR, source_sender_id VARCHAR, source_sender_name VARCHAR, source_message_id VARCHAR, source_message_text VARCHAR, received_at TIMESTAMP, image_count INTEGER, raw_payload_json VARCHAR, temp_drive_folder_id VARCHAR, processing_status VARCHAR DEFAULT 'received', equipment_id VARCHAR, final_status VARCHAR, review_required BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE, error_json VARCHAR, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)"
]
with db_con() as con:
    for stmt in stmts:
        con.execute(stmt)
    alter_stmts = [
        "ALTER TABLE equipment ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS project VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS entity_type VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS source_message_text VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ownership_mode VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS purchase_price DOUBLE",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS purchase_currency VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS acquisition_note VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS review_reasons_json VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS business_context_json VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS processing_status VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS final_status VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS final_drive_folder_id VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS final_drive_folder_path VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS review_required BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment_media ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS equipment_id VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment_media ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS image_role VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment_media ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS original_filename VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment_media ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS temp_drive_folder_id VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment_media ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS temp_drive_file_id VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment_media ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS final_drive_file_id VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment_media ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS final_drive_web_view_link VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment_media ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS final_drive_path VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment_media ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ocr_json VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment_media ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS classification_json VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment_media ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ocr_confidence DOUBLE",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment_media ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS processing_status VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment_media ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS error_json VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment_media ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment_ingestion_log ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS project VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment_ingestion_log ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS entity_type VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment_ingestion_log ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS source_message_text VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment_ingestion_log ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS temp_drive_folder_id VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment_ingestion_log ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS equipment_id VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment_ingestion_log ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS final_status VARCHAR",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment_ingestion_log ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS review_required BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE",
        "ALTER TABLE equipment_ingestion_log ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS error_json VARCHAR"
    ]
    for stmt in alter_stmts:
        try:
            con.execute(stmt)
        except Exception:
            pass
    try:
        con.execute("DROP VIEW IF EXISTS vw_equipment_latest")
    except Exception:
        pass
    try:
        con.execute("CREATE VIEW vw_equipment_latest AS SELECT equipment_id, ingestion_id, project, entity_type, label, category, subtype, brand, model, serial_number, condition_label, location_hint, status, confidence, updated_at FROM equipment")
    except Exception:
        pass
out = []
for it in items:
    d = dict(it.get('json', {}) or {})
    d['_db_path'] = DB_PATH
    out.append({'json': d})
return out

parameters.jsCode:
const draft = $json.equipment_draft_v2 || {};
const validation = draft.validation || {};
const media = Array.isArray(draft.media) ? draft.media : [];
const finalization = $json.finalization || {};
return [{ json: {
  ok: true,
  stage: validation.stage || $json.processing_status || 'draft_ready_pending_finalization',
  project: draft.project || $json.project,
  entity_type: draft.entity_type || $json.entity_type || 'equipment',
  ingestion_id: $json.ingestion_id,
  equipment_id: $json.equipment_id,
  source: draft.source || { channel: $json.source, sender: $json.sender, message: $json.message },
  temp_drive_root_id: $json.temp_drive_root_id || null,
  temp_drive_folder_id: $json.temp_drive_folder_id || null,
  temp_drive_folder_name: $json.temp_drive_folder_name || null,
  temp_drive_folder_path: $json.temp_drive_folder_path || null,
  temp_drive_folder_web_view_link: $json.temp_drive_folder_web_view_link || null,
  final_drive_folder_id: draft.equipment?.final_drive_folder_id || $json.final_drive_folder_id || null,
  final_drive_folder_name: draft.equipment?.final_drive_folder_name || $json.final_drive_folder_name || finalization.final_drive_folder_name || null,
  final_drive_folder_path: draft.equipment?.final_drive_folder_path || $json.final_drive_folder_path || null,
  final_drive_folder_web_view_link: finalization.final_drive_folder_web_view_link || $json.final_drive_folder_web_view_link || null,
  manifest_file_id: finalization.manifest_file_id || null,
  manifest_web_view_link: finalization.manifest_web_view_link || null,
  reused_existing_folder: $json.reused_existing_folder ?? finalization.reused_existing_folder ?? null,
  review_required: $json.review_required ?? validation.review_required ?? null,
  error_json: $json.error_json || null,
  db_path: $json._db_path || '/files/duckdb/siga_v1.duckdb',
  equipment_draft: draft,
  equipment_summary: draft.equipment || {},
  business_context: draft.business_context || {},
  media_summary: media.map(m => ({ media_id: m.media_id, image_index: m.image_index, image_role: m.image_role, original_filename: m.original_filename, drive_file_name: m.drive_file_name || m.final_drive_name || m.temp_drive_file_name || m.original_filename || null, contains_nameplate: m.contains_nameplate, brand: m.brand, model: m.model, serial_number: m.serial_number, classification_json: m.classification_json || null, temp_drive_folder_id: m.temp_drive_folder_id, temp_drive_file_id: m.temp_drive_file_id, temp_drive_web_view_link: m.temp_drive_web_view_link, final_drive_file_id: m.final_drive_file_id || null, final_drive_web_view_link: m.final_drive_web_view_link || null, final_drive_path: m.final_drive_path || null, processing_status: m.processing_status, error_json: m.error_json || null })),
  validation,
  finalization,
  drive_resolution: finalization.folder_resolution || { temp_root: $json.temp_root_search || null, temp: $json.temp_drive_search || null, final_base: $json.final_base_search || null, final_onboarding: $json.onboarding_folder_search || null, year: $json.year_folder_search || null, month: $json.month_folder_search || null, final: $json.final_folder_search || null },
  auth: $json.auth || null
} }];

nodes.name: Move Temp File to Final Folder

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: ={{ "'" + String($json.temp_root_folder_id || '').replace(/'/g, "\'") + "' in parents and trashed = false and mimeType = 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder' and name = '" + String($json.ingestion_id || '').replace(/'/g, "\'") + "'" }}

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: ={{ "'" + String($json.final_onboarding_folder_id || '').replace(/'/g, "\'") + "' in parents and trashed = false and mimeType = 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder' and name = '" + String($json.finalization_plan && $json.finalization_plan.year ? $json.finalization_plan.year : '').replace(/'/g, "\'") + "'" }}

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: ={{ "'" + String($json.final_year_folder_id || '').replace(/'/g, "\'") + "' in parents and trashed = false and mimeType = 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder' and name = '" + String($json.finalization_plan && $json.finalization_plan.month ? $json.finalization_plan.month : '').replace(/'/g, "\'") + "'" }}

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: ={{ "'" + String($json.final_month_folder_id || '').replace(/'/g, "\'") + "' in parents and trashed = false and mimeType = 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder' and name = '" + String($json.ingestion_id || '').replace(/'/g, "\'") + "'" }}

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: ={{ "'" + String($json.context && $json.context.default_drive_root_id ? $json.context.default_drive_root_id : 'root').replace(/'/g, "\'") + "' in parents and trashed = false and mimeType = 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder' and name = 'SIGA_TEMP'" }}

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: ={{ "'" + String($json.finalization_plan && $json.finalization_plan.default_drive_root_id ? $json.finalization_plan.default_drive_root_id : '').replace(/'/g, "\'") + "' in parents and trashed = false and mimeType = 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder' and name = '" + String($json.finalization_plan && $json.finalization_plan.final_base_folder_name ? $json.finalization_plan.final_base_folder_name : 'SIGA').replace(/'/g, "\'") + "'" }}

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: ={{ "'" + String($json.final_base_folder_id || '').replace(/'/g, "\'") + "' in parents and trashed = false and mimeType = 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder' and name = '" + String($json.finalization_plan && $json.finalization_plan.final_onboarding_folder_name ? $json.finalization_plan.final_onboarding_folder_name : 'onboarding').replace(/'/g, "\'") + "'" }}
